__notes__.WCL: Wildcat Lake product — bigcore/atomcore/ring/GT/DE from WCL HAS
__notes__.NVL: Nova Lake product — GT/DE/ITD from NVL HAS
__notes__.GFC: GFC bigcore-tile IP specs (Granite Falls Crestmont) — used by RZL, TTL, HBO platforms via alias in spec_db.py

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.VF_RATIO.description: Ratio for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing ratio in 100MHz Units for IA/RING. (10 instances)

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.VF_VOLTAGE.description: Voltage for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing voltage in U1.8 format. (10 instances)

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.ITD_SLOPE.description: ITD slope correction (low temp). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.ITD_SLOPE2.description: ITD slope correction (2nd point). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.LEAK.description: Leakage current at RC0, Tref, Vref. Fuse in U6.6 amperes.

CLUSTER0_BIGCORE.CDYN_MAX.description: Max dynamic capacitance at RC0, Vref, Tref in U5.5 (nF).

ATOMCORE.VF_RATIO.description: Ratio for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing ratio in 100MHz Units. (10 instances)

ATOMCORE.VF_VOLTAGE.description: Voltage for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing voltage in U1.8 format. (10 instances)

ATOMCORE.ITD_SLOPE.description: ITD slope correction (low temp). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

ATOMCORE.ITD_SLOPE2.description: ITD slope correction (2nd point). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

ATOMCORE.LEAK.description: Leakage current at RC0, Tref, Vref. Fuse in U6.6 amperes.

ATOMCORE.CDYN_MAX.description: Max dynamic capacitance at RC0, Vref, Tref in U5.5 (nF).

RING.VF_RATIO.description: Ratio for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing ratio in 100MHz Units. (10 instances)

RING.VF_VOLTAGE.description: Voltage for ratio/voltage points for power plane. Characterizing voltage in U1.8 format. (10 instances)

RING.ITD_SLOPE.description: ITD slope correction (low temp). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

RING.ITD_SLOPE2.description: ITD slope correction (2nd point). Fuse in U-8.16 (1/C).

RING.LEAK.description: Leakage current at RC0, Tref, Vref. Fuse in U6.6 amperes.

RING.CDYN_MAX.description: Max dynamic capacitance at RC0, Vref, Tref in U5.5 (nF).

GT_PN_RATIO.description: Lowest requested p-state can be equal or greater than the real minimum (fmax @ Vmin)

GTPRESENT.description: Fuse hosted in SGUnit, that allows BIOS to know whether to trigger GT wake.

GDIE_DISABLE.description: Punit fuse to determine whether to bring Graphics Die ON and out of reset

GT_LEAK.description: Leakage current when GT is in RC0, in U11.5.6 amperes, measured at T=Tref and V=Vref.

GT_CDYN_MAX.description: Maximal dynamic capacitance when GT is in RC0, at Vref and Tref in U10.5.5 (nF).

GT_CDYN_V_CORRECTION.description: Cdyn correction with respect to the voltage. Cdyn=(V-Vref)*correction+Cdyn_max. In U2.5 format.

GT_CDYN_T_CORRECTION.description: Cdyn correction with respect to the temperature. Usage and format TBD.

GT_ITD_CUTOFF_V.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant. The fuse is in U1.8 volts.

GT_ITD_SLOPE.description: Slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures. The fuse is in U-7.16 (1/C).

GT_ITD_CUTOFF_V2.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant (2nd point). The fuse is in U1.8 volts.

GT_ITD_SLOPE2.description: Second slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures. The fuse is in U-7.16 (1/C).

GT_LEAK_EQ_V.description: Correction factor b for leakage w.r.t. temperature: e^(a(V-Vref)+b(T-Tref)+c(V-Vref)(T-Tref)). In U2.7 format.

GT_LEAK_EQ_T.description: Correction factor c for leakage w.r.t. voltage and temperature: e^(a(V-Vref)+b(T-Tref)+c(V-Vref)(T-Tref)). In U-4.13 format.

GT_LEAK_EQ_VT.description: Correction factor a for leakage w.r.t. voltage: e^(a(V-Vref)+b(T-Tref)+c(V-Vref)(T-Tref)). In U-5.13 format.

GT_ACM_ENABLE.description: This fuse determines if the GT ACM is enabled (formerly GT_CEP_ENABLE).

GCD_MIN_BETA.description: Pcode derates VID to take CEP credit. Below this value CEP is disabled. Used in MBVR VID calculation.

GCD_MIN_ALPHA.description: Gap parameter to set the throttle threshold far from Vmin. Used in V_CEP_threshold = Vmin,all + alpha*Imax,all + offset.

GFX_TJ_MAX.description: Maximum Temperature GT die is allowed to reach, in 8-bit unsigned format.

GNOC_ITD_SLOPE2.description: GDIE NOC ITD slope correction (2nd point) for voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures. Fuse in U-7.16 (1/C). New for PTL.

GNOC_LEAK_EQ_V.description: GDIE NOC correction factor b for leakage equation. In U2.7 format. New for PTL.

GNOC_LEAK_EQ_T.description: GDIE NOC correction factor c for leakage equation. In U-4.13 format. New for PTL.

GNOC_LEAK_EQ_VT.description: GDIE NOC correction factor a for leakage equation. In U-5.13 format. New for PTL.

MIN_GDIE_NOCPLL_RATIO.description: GDIE NOCPLL Min Frequency. PLL ratio is 2X of the CFC/C2C clk. New for PTL.

MAX_GDIE_NOCPLL_RATIO.description: GDIE NOCPLL Max Frequency. PLL ratio is 2X of the CFC/C2C clk. New for PTL.

MIN_GD2DPLL_RATIO.description: GD2DPLL Min Frequency. New for PTL.

MAX_GD2DPLL_RATIO.description: GD2DPLL Max Frequency. New for PTL.

BOOT_GDIE_NOCPLL_RATIO.description: GDIE NOCPLL Boot Frequency. PLL ratio is 2X of the CFC/C2C clk. New for PTL.

BOOT_GD2DPLL_RATIO.description: GD2DPLL Boot Frequency. New for PTL.

GT_EBB_TRIM_VOLTAGE_LEVEL_0.description: Voltage Level for EBB TRIM voltage level select for GT arrays. New for PTL.

GT_EBB_TRIM_VOLTAGE_LEVEL_1.description: Voltage Level for EBB TRIM voltage level select for GT arrays. New for PTL.

GT_EBB_TRIM_VOLTAGE_LEVEL_2.description: Voltage Level for EBB TRIM voltage level select for GT arrays. New for PTL.

GT_EBB_TRIM_VOLTAGE_LEVEL_3.description: Voltage Level for EBB TRIM voltage level select for GT arrays. New for PTL.

GT_EBB_TRIM_VOLTAGE_LEVEL_4.description: Voltage Level for EBB TRIM voltage level select for GT arrays. New for PTL.

DE_FMAX.description: The maximum CDclk Display is supporting in this SKU. This frequency must be in the range of VF curve fuses. New for PTL.

DE_FMIN.description: The CDclk Display should support at Vmin. New for PTL.

DE_UNGATED_LEAK.description: DE Ungated Leakage. Leakage current in U11.5.6 amperes for DE at T=Tref and V=Vref.

DE_LEAK_MAX.description: DE maximum leakage current in U11.5.6 amperes.

DE_LEAK_PIPE.description: DE leakage of one Pipe, in U11.5.6 amperes.

DE_UNGATED_CDYN_MAX.description: Active Cdyn for DE Ungated in U8.3.5 (nF) for DE.

DE_CDYN_PIPE.description: Active Cdyn in U8.3.5 (nF) for one DE Pipe.

DE_CDYN_MAX.description: Maximum Active Cdyn in U8.3.5 (nF) for DE.

IGD.description: Internal Graphics Disable. Used in resolving with DSKU. 0: Enabled, 1: Disabled.

GT_PN_RATIO.description: Lowest requested p-state can be equal or greater than the real minimum (fmax @ Vmin)

GTPRESENT.description: Fuse hosted in SGUnit, that allows BIOS to know whether to trigger GT wake.

GDIE_DISABLE.description: Punit fuse to determine whether to bring Graphics Die ON and out of reset. MTL legacy.

GT_LEAK.description: Leakage current when GT is in RC0, in U11.5.6 amperes, measured at T=Tref and V=Vref.

GT_CDYN_MAX.description: Maximal dynamic capacitance when GT is in RC0, at Vref and Tref in U10.5.5 (nF).

GT_CDYN_V_CORRECTION.description: Cdyn correction with respect to the voltage. Cdyn=(V-Vref)*correction+Cdyn_max. In U2.5 format.

GT_CDYN_T_CORRECTION.description: Cdyn correction with respect to the temperature.

GT_ITD_CUTOFF_V.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant. The fuse is in U9.1.8 volts.

GT_ITD_SLOPE.description: Slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures. The fuse is in U-8.16 (1/C).

GT_ITD_CUTOFF_V2.description: Second voltage cutoff for ITD effect. The fuse is in U9.1.8 volts.

GT_ITD_SLOPE2.description: Second slope for voltage ITD correction at low temperatures. The fuse is in U-8.16 (1/C).

GT_LEAK_EQ_V.description: Correction factor b for leakage w.r.t. temperature: e^(a(V-Vref)+b(T-Tref)+c(V-Vref)(T-Tref)). In U-4.13 format.

GT_LEAK_EQ_T.description: Correction factor c for leakage w.r.t. voltage and temperature. In U-5.13 format.

GT_LEAK_EQ_VT.description: Correction factor a for leakage w.r.t. voltage. In U2.7 format.

GT_ACM_ENABLE.description: This fuse determines if the GT ACM is enabled (formerly GT_CEP_ENABLE).

GCD_MIN_BETA.description: Pcode derates VID to take CEP credit. Below this value CEP is disabled. Used in MBVR VID calculation.

GCD_MIN_ALPHA.description: Gap parameter to set the throttle threshold far from Vmin. Used in V_CEP_threshold = Vmin,all + alpha*Imax,all + offset.

GFX_TJ_MAX.description: Maximum Temperature GT die is allowed to reach, in 8-bit unsigned format.

DE_CDYN_MAX.description: Active Cdyn in U8.3.5 (nF) for DE. Maximal value (e.g. all pipes up).

DE_CDYN_PIPE.description: Cdyn per pipe in U8.3.5 (nF) for DE.

DE_CDYN_UNGATED.description: Cdyn in base configuration (Ungated domain) in U8.3.5 (nF) for DE with zero active pipes.

DE_LEAK_MAX.description: DE Max leakage. Leakage current in U11.5.6 amperes for DE on SA power plane at T=Tref and V=Vref.

DE_LEAK_PIPE.description: DE leakage per pipe. Leakage current in U11.5.6 amperes for DE on SA power plane at T=Tref and V=Vref.

DE_LEAK_UNGATED.description: DE leakage in base configuration (Ungated domain). Leakage current in U11.5.6 amperes for DE on SA power plane at T=Tref and V=Vref.

DE_VF_RATIO_0.description: cdclk (DE) ratio supported by DE. CDCLK Frequency VF_RATIO_0 = 408MHz.

DE_VF_RATIO_1.description: cdclk (DE) ratio supported by DE. CDCLK Frequency VF_RATIO_1 = 624MHz.

DE_VF_RATIO_2.description: cdclk (DE) ratio supported by DE. CDCLK Frequency VF_RATIO_2 = 696MHz.

DE_VF_RATIO_3.description: cdclk (DE) ratio supported by DE. CDCLK Frequency VF_RATIO_3 = 792MHz.

DE_VF_VOLTAGE_0.description: cdclk (DE) domain voltage corresponding to VF_RATIO_0.

DE_VF_VOLTAGE_1.description: cdclk (DE) domain voltage corresponding to VF_RATIO_1.

DE_VF_VOLTAGE_2.description: cdclk (DE) domain voltage corresponding to VF_RATIO_2.

DE_VF_VOLTAGE_3.description: cdclk (DE) domain voltage corresponding to VF_RATIO_3.

DISABLE_DISPLAY_PARTIAL_SLEEP.description: Display Partial Sleep Disable. 0: Enabled, 1: Disabled.

SA_DLVR_DE_SUPPORTED.description: SA DLVR Support for DE. 0: DLVR Not supported, 1: DLVR supported.

DISPLAY_PIPEC_DIS.description: Display 3rd Pipe Disable. 0: Enabled, 1: Disabled. Reserved (Unused in NVL).

IGD.description: Internal Graphics Disable. Used in resolving with DSKU. 0: Enabled, 1: Disabled.

CUTOFF_V.description: ITD cutoff voltage. Per IA CCP (ACP), CCF (Ring), GT, NPU, Rest of SA, Hub Atom (dedicated), DLVRs.

CUTOFF_V2.description: Second ITD cutoff voltage. Per IA CCP (ACP), CCF (Ring), GT, NPU, Rest of SA, Hub Atom (dedicated), DLVRs.

SLOPE.description: ITD slope. Per IA CCP (ACP), CCF (Ring), GT, NPU, Rest of SA, Hub Atom (dedicated), DLVRs.

SLOPE2.description: Second ITD slope. Per IA CCP (ACP), CCF (Ring), GT, NPU, Rest of SA, Hub Atom (dedicated), DLVRs.

FLOOR_VOLTAGE.description: ITD floor voltage. Per IA CCP (ACP), CCF (Ring), GT, NPU, Rest of SA, Hub Atom (dedicated), DLVRs.

ITD_CUTOFF_TJ.description: ITD cutoff temperature. One fuse per die (C-die, Hub die). Value dependent on characterization temperature, typically TJMAX.

MIN_TEMPERATURE.description: Minimum temperature fuse. One fuse per die (C-die, Hub die). All die have same value.

TRUE_TD_ENABLE.description: Enable true thermal design. One fuse per die (C-die, Hub die).

ITD_SLOPE_ABOVE_CUTOFF_TJ.description: Slope above cutoff TJ for ITD correction. One fuse for all Atom in a die, one for all Big cores, one for CCF, NPU, one for rest SA domain, one for GT, Hub Atom (dedicated).

FUSES_IA_AVX256_VF_DELTA.description: AVX256 delta for VF curve array (NUM_VF_CURVE_FUSED_PTS=5)

FUSES_IA_AVX512_VF_DELTA.description: AVX512 delta for VF curve array (NUM_VF_CURVE_FUSED_PTS=5)

BOOT_RATIO_FUSE.description: WP1 boot fuses - MCLK ratio in 16.67 MHz

BOOT_VID_FUSE.description: WP1 boot fuses - Core Ceiling Voltage

BOOT_LEAKAGE_INDEX_FUSE.description: WP3 - TypeA - 0 if no default budget, 1 default budget (Auto Wake Up)

BOOT_CDYN_FLOOR_INDEX_FUSE.description: WP3 - Type A - Minimum Cdyn needed to keep the core functional, Copy to Short_Cdyn_index

BOOT_ICC_LIMIT_FUSE.description: WP3 - Type B - Minimum Current to keep the core functional

BOOT_VCCIN_GRANT_FUSE.description: WP3 - Type B - FIVR/DLVR Input Target Voltage Hint

BOOT_NUM_DOMIN_ACTIE_ALLOWED_FUSE.description: WP3 - Type B/A - 0 if no default budget, 1 default budget (Auto Wake Up)

IA_AGING_DELTA_VF_VOLTAGE_11.description: Core full aging voltage values per VF point 11 to be reduced from full GB VF

AGING_GB_SLOPE1.description: Slope used to calculate every aging GB per voltage (slope 1)

AGING_GB_SLOPE2.description: Slope used to calculate every aging GB per voltage (slope 2)

AGING_VOLTAGE_COMPENSATION_AT_CROSS_POIN.description: Voltage intercept point (VX) between Slope0/Slope1 linear lines

ITD_FLOOR_V.description: The ITD voltage compensation which below it the value is clipped to the same value (AcodeFuse)

FUSES_IA_ITD_FLOOR_V.description: The ITD voltage compensation which below it the value is clipped to the same value (PcodeFuse)

DTD_NSALERT_THR_0.description: High threshold for Throttle Hammer detection

DTD_NSALERT_THR_1.description: Low threshold for Throttle Hammer detection

IA_ITD_CUTOFF_V.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant

IA_ITD_CUTOFF_V2.description: Second voltage cutoff for new ITD algorithm

IA_ITD_SLOPE.description: Slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures

IA_ITD_SLOPE2.description: Second slope for new ITD algorithm

ITD_SLOPE_ABOVE_CUTOFF_TJ.description: Perform temperature dependent correction above TJMAX (ITD_CUTOFF_TJ) using a new slope

ITD_CUTOFF_TJ.description: The temperature from which and below, ITD effect is relevant

MIN_ACCURATE_TEMP.description: The minimal reliable temperature DTS can report; if the coldest sensor value is below this number, Acode uses ITD_MIN_OVERRIDE_TEMP for ITD calculations

ITD_MIN_OVERRIDE_TEMP.description: The temperature to be used for ITD calculations when the coldest DTS sensor value is below MIN_ACCURATE_TEMP
